name: Verify transition to checkout page and user profile info form view -- @1.1

steps.name: Given the user opens the corporate travel portal application homepage
And the user dismisses initial overlay login alerts if present
When the user navigates into the Travel Insurance matrix panel page
When the user loads test metrics from row "1" inside CSV file "data/insurance.csv"
And the user configures the flow map targeting destination country from data
And the user configures traveler volume parameters from data
And the user executes plan searches and clicks buy now on plan card from data
Then the traveler contact form layout layer view visibility should be confirmed

fullName: Travel Insurance Form Validations and Layout Checkpoints: Verify transition to checkout page and user profile info form view

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Travel Insurance Form Validations and Layout Checkpoints
